name: agent-ops-platform
description: Software-only AI agent operations platform with governance, budgets, and compliance

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @agent-ops/shared && npm run build -w @agent-ops/api && npm run build -w @agent-ops/web
